title: Spicy Italian Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish that combines the spices of Italy with a spicy kick.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the Italian sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through.
Add the smoked paprika and stir to combine.
Add the spicy stir-fry sauce and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
